data: {"generalSituation":"A broad trough of low pressure will linger over the coast of southern China in the next couple of days. There will be heavy showers and squally thunderstorms over the region. With the broad trough of low pressure departing from the coastal areas, showers will ease off gradually over Guangdong midweek this week. An easterly airstream is expected to affect the coast of Guangdong in the middle and latter parts of this week. There will be a few showers over the region. Besides, the tropical cyclone over the East China Sea will move across the seas south of Japan and transform into an extratropical cyclone today and tomorrow.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260607","week":"Sunday","forecastWind":"Southwest force 3 to 4.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with occasional showers and a few squally thunderstorms.
